education_requirements: Master’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or Computer Science with a Data Science certification, or an Engineering degree specializing in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence.
experience_requirements: 0–2 years of experience in data science, analytics, or statistical modelling (including internships or academic projects)
soft_skills: ability to work with large datasets and perform data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis
ability to set and uphold coding standards
ability to explain technical concepts clearly
ability to contribute to shared goals
ability to present to peers, senior management, and cross-functional partners
understanding of relevant internal business relationships
ability to resolve complex business challenges using deep technical knowledge and industry insight
exposure to financial services, investment banking, or related domains
experience working with distributed or global teams
